title: Wavy Sand
description: Sand and red sand now with waves!
body: In real life, sand, both in deserts and on the seabed, is often covered in small waves. This resource pack adds this to Minecraft. I'm sure many would like a block with a similar texture, but until one exists, you can play with Wavy Sand!![Desert with wavy sand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aff15b811dccc547a5747c2793977f22c75c68cc_0.webp)
